_schema: Random events. All events surface as choice/conversation interrupts — never silent modifiers. trigger: conditions checked at day-advance. If dialogue_tree set, event opens DialogueRunner; else presents inline choices. Sample set; full slice needs 10-12.

events.title: Hollis's Baler Dies
events.notes: Canonical Mechanic ripple chain (CHARACTERS_SPEC §3). not_flags: skip if the player already resolved it by visiting.

events.title: Storm Front Coming
events.notes: Old School ripple chain: protect own planting vs help Hollis sandbag. High priority: weather won't wait.

choices.text: Rig netting over the run (costs a Morning block)

events.title: Something Came Into the Weaver Yard
events.notes: Mechanic-only: opens the two salvage deals with a hold-until-Friday window (full auction system is Phase 3).
